case_title: LESCANO, RIZZA MARIE R. vs. CONSOLACION, FRANCO H. IND & DBA FRANCO

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONSOLACION, FRANCO H. IND & DBA FRANCO H. CONSOLACION, MBA, CPA. $1,777.50 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,860.50
